locator.quote: most pair attempts don't complete — so the sizing fix only

text: Most pair attempts don't complete, so the asymmetric-hedging sizing fix only applies to 14.5% of attempts; the rest become directional at the aggressive leg's original stake.

locator.quote: the lever to move that 14.5 % up.

text: Active management is the lever to move that 14.5% completion rate up — the sizing fix only matters once pairs complete.
